untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top requires detection of two sloping trend lines (upward top, downward bottom) with multiple intersections forming higher highs and lower lows. This multi-pivot trend structure cannot be precisely expressed with single-bar or simple moving average conditions. Pattern requires trend line fitting/detection which is not available in the indicator set. Converted entry to approximate breakout below dc_lower with volatility expansion, but loses the core megaphone structure validation.
